subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1920-01-01
subcodes.first_line: The solution to this issue is simple. Kalam [the Word] appears in three types. One is oral, which is composed of airwaves, impacts the orifice of the ear and is made and assembled of letters
subcodes.first_line_orig: حل این مسئله آسان است کلام بر سه قسم است یکی لفظی که عبارت از تموج هواست که صماخ گوش را
subcodes.subjects: @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @knowledge; recognition of God
